prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif. Avilia should actively demonstrate the article's point.

Scene: a left-right comparison. Left side: Avilia speaks to an image model through a messy chat bubble saying "请 16:9 4K", and the output canvas comes out slightly crooked with uncertain dimensions. Right side: Avilia inserts a solid command tag "--size 3840x2160" into a clean generation pipe, and the output is a neat 16:9 frame with dimension ticks.

Core meaning: natural language wishes are unstable; explicit size parameters make the workflow stable.

Style: clean hand-drawn blog illustration, generous white space, black lines, white background, dark red accents, tiny blue only for system feedback. Minimal handwritten Chinese annotations: "prompt 愿望", "显式 size", "尺寸校验通过".

Avoid PPT flowchart look, avoid commercial poster, avoid complicated architecture, avoid lots of text.
